headline: Callum Wilson
body: Brentford set to sign Callum Wilson on initial 12 month deal. Deal at advanced stage and expectation it is completed by end of the week. With NizaarKinsella bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art… Link Brentford transfer news: Callum Wilson set to sign for Bees after West Ham exit Brentford are set to sign former England striker Callum Wilson on an initial 12-month contract after his exit from relegated West Ham. bbc.co.uk
raw_text:
Brentford set to sign Callum Wilson on initial 12 month deal. Deal at advanced stage and expectation it is completed by end of the week. With @NizaarKinsella bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art…

Link



Brentford transfer news: Callum Wilson set to sign for Bees after West Ham exit

Brentford are set to sign former England striker Callum Wilson on an initial 12-month contract after his exit from relegated West Ham.
